select_or_draw_area.chose_select_or_draw: Choose existing parcels or draw a custom area.
select_or_draw_area.draw_tip: Use these symbols to start and finish drawing. Move corner points by holding them until they appear above your finger, then dragging it to the desired location.

errors.email_taken: This email is already in use

forgot_password.enter_email: Please enter your email to reset your password.

farm_name.heading: Welcome to Coltivio!
farm_name.subheading: Enter a name for your farm

modal.heading: Your Farm Registration Number
modal.body: Tap a parcel or manually enter your registration number.

modal_not_found.heading: Your Farm Registration Number
modal_not_found.body: Unfortunately, we could not find any parcels at your location. The Cantons of Obwalden, Nidwalden and Waadt are unfortunately not yet supported. You can skip this step and manually draw your plots.

summary.heading: All set!
summary.plots_info: Deine Flächen werden basierend auf deiner Betriebsnummer als Schläge hinzugefügt.
summary.crops_info: Die momentane Kultur wird vom Nutzungscode abgeleitet.
summary.edit_plots_info: Du kannst deine Flächen jederzeit unter 'Schläge' oder über die Karte bearbeiten.
summary.press_save_to_finish: Tap Save to create your farm.
summary.no_federal_farm_id: Leider konnten wir deine Flächen nicht automatisch hinzufügen. Du kannst deine Flächen unter 'Schläge' oder unter der Karte manuell hinzufügen. Wir arbeiten daran, sobald wie möglich alle Standorte zu unterstützen.

users.verify_new_email_before_in_effect: You must verify your new email address before the change takes effect.
users.email_verified: Your email address has been successfully verified.
users.email_change_verification_sent: An email has been sent to verify your new address. Once verified, your new address will be active.
users.verification_mail_sent: An email has been sent to {{email}} to verify your address.

farm.enter_farm_name_to_delete: To delete your farm, enter the farm name.
farm.chose_option_to_delete_account: To also delete your account, enable 'Delete Account'.

common.draw_area_overlap_info: Overlapping an existing plot will automatically reduce the area.
common.affected_plots_warning: Warning: Overlapping plots will be reduced.

mode_select.message: Select a parcel or draw a new area to create a plot.

parcel_select.heading: Select a Parcel
parcel_select.overlap_info: Overlapping an existing plot will automatically reduce the area.

draw_area.heading: Draw a New Plot
draw_area.drawing_info: Use these symbols to start and finish drawing. Move corner points by holding them until they appear above your finger, then drag to the desired position.

edit_area.heading: Edit Plot
edit_area.move_markers: Hold corner points until they appear above your finger, then drag them to the desired location.

delete.heading: Delete plot {{name}}?
delete.entries_warning: All records for this plot will be permanently deleted.
delete.confirm_by_typing_name: Type the plot name to confirm deletion.

agri_coltivio.subheading: Together for free and independent agriculture
agri_coltivio.section_1: AgriColtivio, which developed this app, is a non-profit association aimed at strengthening small and medium-sized farms.
agri_coltivio.section_2: This app is open source, meaning that the source code is publicly accessible - transparent and verifiable.
agri_coltivio.section_3_bold: Data security is a top priority.
agri_coltivio.section_3: All data is stored exclusively on servers within the EU and is subject to strict GDPR data protection regulations.
agri_coltivio.section_4: The operation and further development of this app are funded solely through voluntary donations.
agri_coltivio.section_5_title: Help ensure the app remains free and independent for everyone.
agri_coltivio.section_5: Become a member or support us with a donation. Every contribution helps – big or small.
agri_coltivio.section_6: Thank you for being part of it.
